title: nephrodium biserratum
intro: Nephrodium biserratum, also known as the biserrate nephrodium or maidenhair fern, is a species of fern in the family Matoniaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Nephrodium biserratum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Nephrodium biserratum is often used in teas, infusions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
